steps.body: Exercises the Phase 2 mcp_tool action handler. Run setup to invoke unity_open_mcp_ping via the engine CLI; the result appears in the action log.

steps.title: Run a bridge ping via mcp_tool

items: Action log shows mcp_tool result with isError=false when the bridge is running
Action log surfaces a tool error (isError=true) without crashing when the bridge is offline
